blocks.content: System Operation (2)
However, Shirone did not stop teleporting.
No matter how precise the defense, it couldn't overcome the mechanism of action-response.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Now!
As Shirone leaned his body into the photonized state, Dante turned into light and retreated.
It was an almost superhuman reflex, but this time, it became his downfall.
Shirone abandoned his fake motion and withdrew.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Damn!
By the time Dante realized Shirone's strategy, the teleportation had already been activated, increasing the distance between them.
As the distance suddenly widened to 20 meters in an instant, Shirone immediately fired Photon Cannon.
With the approaching photon net taking over all available space, even Dante's movements became futile.
He chose the only escape route left—the ground—and upon landing, he immediately deployed a defensive magic circle above his head.
Shirone gritted his teeth and cast magic repeatedly.
Immortal Function expands the mage's mind infinitely, but the reality is not so accommodating.
If the infinite lock is completely undone, the mage's sense of self will disintegrate.
That is why an Unlocker draws infinite power through a hole called the Spirit Zone.
Spirit Zone acts as a barrier that supports the boundary between reality and infinity.

Ultimately, it could be called endless mental strength, but if one's Spirit Zone's durability is not enough to withstand the infinite weight, it also carries the risk of being swept away in an instant.
However, Shirone did not waver even though he was consuming more mental strength than his limit.
This was thanks to him having reached the state of Indestructible Diamond, a state that had surpassed the realm of endurance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: More! More! More!
With immense mental strength, Photon Cannon relentlessly poured down onto the ground.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Ugh!
Dante, with ten defensive magic circles spread above his head like a roof, struggled to hold on with all his might.
Despite his efforts, he found it hard to believe.
Any human would naturally see their power weaken with continuous magic casting, but Shirone's onslaught was not diminishing; it was growing stronger.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Damn it! What kind of attack power is this?
Even against the kingdom's best hard punchers, he had never felt so overwhelmed.
Dante suddenly realized.
Immortal Function. The mental realm, which he had dismissed as mere spiritual play by monks, was now crushing him mercilessly.
The bombardment continued for a full two minutes.
Dante couldn't move from where he was standing.
Even his evasion ability, which was his specialty, was no match for the hailstorm of attacks.
The students glanced anxiously at their bracelets, which were heating up from the intensity of the battle.

The fact that the bracelet, which controls information exchange within the arena, was getting hot enough to feel on their skin was proof that the amount of information being exchanged between Shirone and Dante was skyrocketing.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: This isn't going to explode, is it?

blocks.speaker: Mark
blocks.content: Don't worry. There were no problems even in the graduating class.

blocks.speaker: Mark
blocks.content: Even if the system overheats, there are safety measures in place for the worst-case scenario.

blocks.speaker: Mark
blocks.content: I, I see.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Of course, it's not common for it to get this hot, though.
Shirone was beginning to feel frustrated.
It had already been over three minutes, yet Dante's defense had not been breached.
However, Dante's fierce resistance only fueled Shirone's determination even more.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then…!
Shirone ceased the rapid fire of Photon Cannons and instead cast Laser.
A single red beam of light descended onto Dante's magic circle.
When the impact seemed weaker than expected, Dante laughed as if it were nothing and started to repair the magic circle.
About ten magic circles instantly returned to their perfect state.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: What, what is this…!
The moment Dante let out a word of astonishment, Shirone amplified his Laser with all his might.
The beam's thickness began to increase rapidly.
Finally, as the power drawn from the infinite realm was fully unleashed, a massive red beam engulfed the spot where Dante stood.
The students swallowed hard as they saw Dante's shadow burning in the intense light.
As the laser's thickness decreased and finally disappeared, Dante was revealed, standing motionless with his arms covering his face.
The defensive magic circle that had withstood Photon Cannons was nowhere to be seen.
Shirone landed opposite Dante. Slowly lowering his arms, Dante glared at Shirone, grinding his teeth in frustration.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Shit….
Dante's knees buckled and he hit the ground with a thud.

blocks.speaker: Reporter Killain
blocks.content: This can't be happening… Dante's down on his knees again.
While the first knockdown could have been attributed to Shirone's surprise attack, this time, the knockdown was clearly due to a difference in skill.
That's why the current outcome was shocking to the students.
Even the faculty began to murmur among themselves.
Who would have thought that Shirone, who had only been learning magic for a year, would be able to knock down the kingdom's greatest student, Dante, not once, but twice?

blocks.speaker: Ethella
blocks.content: He has a sharp personality, but his magic is surprisingly heavy. His lack of finesse is a disadvantage, but his destructive power far outweighs that.

blocks.speaker: Thad
blocks.content: Well, he's serious about everything.
The students' enthusiasm grew even hotter with Dante's downfall.
Everyone began chanting Shirone's name, and the echo of their cheers further heightened the atmosphere.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Shirone's magic… was it originally that intense?

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: It could be that he's more confident now, or maybe he's also aiming for a psychological effect. It's a change from last semester. It seems like something's shifted within him.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Well… We did go through some rough times.
Shirone had fought a fierce battle against the Parrot Mercenaries on Galliant Island and faced countless formidable enemies beyond human comprehension in Heaven.

blocks.speaker: Reporter Killain
blocks.content: Oh my gosh…. Dante… How could this happen….

blocks.speaker: Reporter Killain
blocks.content: Shirone? How is it that a student like him has never been featured in any magazine before?
According to her research, Shirone had only been attending the magic academy for a year.
If that were true, there wouldn't have been enough time for him to stand out, let alone for her to cover him in an article.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: A second knockdown. This is a first for me too.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: I'm sorry. It seems I underestimated you.
At that moment, a massive magic circle emitting a red light began to form around Dante.
The clarity of the circle far surpassed that of an instant magic circle, and its size was more than ten times greater.

blocks.speaker: Sienna
blocks.content: Central Computational Magic Circle: Pascal.
As Dante murmured these words, the giant magic circle flared red, and over a hundred magic circles appeared simultaneously.
Shirone was stunned as he watched the magic circles each prepare different magics.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Immortal Function. I thought it was ridiculous, but it's definitely amazing. I suppose it's the insight of an Unlocker.
Shirone had no time to respond.
He didn't know what kind of magic this was, but it was on a completely different level than instant magic circles.
If he didn't analyze it quickly, he would lose his advantage.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This time, I'll show you what I have.
As soon as Dante reached out his hand, all kinds of magic poured out from over hundred magic circles.
Wind Cutter, Fireball, Lightning Bolt, Ice Spear, and even non-physical Photon Output.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: What was most shocking was that more than 10 types of magic were being cast simultaneously.

blocks.speaker: Mark
blocks.content: Is that even possible? Unless you have multiple brains, you can only create one magic circle with one omniscience. Even with passive spells, it's standard to create them in sequential order.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: That's it. Dante has essentially created another brain. That magic circle in the center, that magic circle is clearly converging Dante's mental strength and distributing it in parallel.
Nade's guess was spot on.
Pascal was a magic circle that stored the electricity flowing in the mage's head into memory and then processed it through parallel operations.
When Dante activates Pascal, he is anything but defensive. Instead, he overwhelms his opponent with extreme firepower.
As if to prove that fact, all the basic magic that could be learned in the academy was popping out.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There's no time. I have to finish this now.
There was not much time left to maintain the infinite realm.
This was his only chance to overpower Dante with sheer force.
Shirone fired Photon Cannon with all his might.
But as it passed through a certain area, its speed suddenly began to slow down.
The photon, which had been moving at nearly the speed of light, slowed to the point where it could be compared to a snail.
Shirone looked ahead and realized what was happening.
The hundreds of magic circles Dante had deployed were forming small clusters, exerting influence over specific spaces.
When these clustered magic circles were connected with an imaginary plane, they formed a cube, like a die, and were activating specific magics within that space.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: A three-dimensional mansion? A student can actually pull that off?
Dante had assembled two-dimensional flat magic circles into a three-dimensional structure.
Shirone's Photon Cannon had slowed down because it entered a mansion formed by six Slow Magic circles, each spaced five meters apart.
When it comes to how many circuits can be integrated into a limited space, the three-dimensional mansion can demonstrate incredible efficiency that surpasses the limitations of a flat plane.
